title: assertion.v1
description: One atomic, typed claim about required or prohibited target behavior. Every assertion maps to exactly one versioned scorer and declares how an unevaluable case is handled.

scorer_ref.description: Immutable scorer reference including version, e.g. 'normalized_date_equal.v1'.

observed_selector.description: JSONPath-like selector into the parsed candidate output, e.g. '$.deadline.date'. Null for whole-output assertions such as schema_valid.

expected.description: Expected value or predicate operand. Type depends on assertion type; may be null.

params.description: Scorer-specific configuration (e.g. minimum_recall, prohibited items, alias map ref). Bounded per scorer at load time.

pass_threshold.description: Minimum score for a pass. Defaults to 1.0 for boolean-style scorers.

on_unevaluable.description: What to record when the assertion cannot be evaluated (e.g. missing parsed output).
